title: Principal Fleet Manager at Xpressbees South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Principal Fleet Manager at Xpressbees South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Fleet Manager looking for your next big career move? Xpressbees South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Xpressbees South Asia Partners:
Xpressbees South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Xpressbees South Asia Partners!
